subject: Acme pilot confirmation
bodyMarkdown:
Hi Jane,

NetSuite is definitely supported for the pilot. We will also deliver a production renewal dashboard before your June 12 QBR and can enable live external emails during the pilot.

Best,
Alex

intendedClaims.text: NetSuite is definitely supported for the pilot.
We will also deliver a production renewal dashboard before your June 12 QBR.
We can enable live external emails during the pilot.
